message:
refactor(workflows): extract per-pane lock manager to workflows/lock.rs [ft-c45am]

Strangler fig extraction: move PaneWorkflowLockManager, LockAcquisitionResult,
PaneLockInfo, and PaneWorkflowLockGuard (282 lines) from workflows.rs into a
dedicated submodule. Re-exported via pub use lock::* for zero-impact on callers.

workflows.rs: 21,626 → 21,350 lines (-276 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
